opinion.h4: WELLENS v. DILLON, SECRETARY OF THE TREASURY, ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES COURT OF APPEALS FOR THE NINTH CIRCUIT. No. 122. Decided October 8, 1962.
opinion.p: Solicitor General Cox, Acting Assistant Attorney General Guilfoyle and Morton Hollander for appellees.
The appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
MR. JUSTICE GOLDBERG took no part in the consideration or decision of this case.
